_notes: Canonical MCP server config for rebeca-elmudesi. Edit only this file. Run scripts/render-mcp.py to regenerate .mcp.json / .gemini/settings.json / .codex/config.toml / .vscode/mcp.json.

asset-broker._notes: Authenticated client-asset broker — propose reviewed website/brand edits as GitHub PRs (asset-editor skill, fetched via fs_read). Per-user OAuth via Microsoft Entra ID. Requires the stromy-asset-broker GitHub App to be installed on the target repos (rebeca-elmudesi-website, client-data).
